queries.question: What is the percentage of divorces in villages with less than 300 people?
queries.sql: SELECT Divorced_Percentage FROM VillageDemographics WHERE TotalPopulation < 300
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?divorced_percentage WHERE {
  ?villagedemographics a :VillageDemographics .
  ?villagedemographics p:Divorced_Percentage ?divorced_percentage .
  ?villagedemographics p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation_f .
  FILTER(?totalpopulation_f < 300)
}

queries.question: Give the divorce percentage of Village 1.
queries.sql: SELECT Divorced_Percentage  FROM VillageDemographics  WHERE Village = 'Village1'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?divorced_percentage WHERE {
  ?villagedemographics a :VillageDemographics .
  ?villagedemographics p:Divorced_Percentage ?divorced_percentage .
  ?villagedemographics p:Village ?village_f .
  FILTER(?village_f = "Village1")
}
